query:
INSERT INTO pipelineDeals 
  (clientName, clientContact, clientEmail, clientPhone, dealName, serviceType, facility, company, stage, 
   estimatedMonthlyRevenue, estimatedAnnualRevenue, estimatedPallets, estimatedLoads, 
   keyServices, notes, probability, proposalDate)
VALUES 
  ('The Wine Group (via SGWS)', 'Jeff Gomes', NULL, NULL, 
   'Co-Pack Services - Woodbridge & PA 250', 'rework', 'PA-2009', 'L&M', 'lead',
   833300, 10000000, NULL, NULL,
   'Heat shrink twin packs ($0.65-$0.70/set), PLCB labels ($0.40/label), gift box displays ($4.50/set), barcode labeling, sort/segregate, outbound to PLCB',
   'Co-packing opportunity for Woodbridge (Chard, Cab, Pinot Grigio, Sauv Blanc 1.5L), Cupcake Prosecco 750ml, PA 250 Anniversary Edition. Target retailers: Acme, Wegmans, Giant, ShopRite via PA PLCB. ~2,000 cartons per inbound. L-Bar sealer + heat shrink bundling. First project waives sort/seg, order processing, outbound handling. Ad-hoc with long-term partnership goal. Proposal site: copackwinegroup.manus.space',
   50, NOW());

UPDATE pipelineDeals 
SET notes = CONCAT(notes, ' | HIGHLY PROFITABLE ACCOUNT. Strong relationship with Wine Group/Cornerstone. Co-packing opportunity expanding the relationship beyond transportation.')
WHERE clientName = 'Cornerstone Systems (Wine Group)';
